lines.gurmukhi: ਜਉ ਪੈ ਰਸਨਾ ਰਾਮੁ ਨ ਕਹਿਬੋ ॥
lines.translit: jau pai rasanaa raam na kahibo |
lines.english: As long as the tongue does not chant the Lord's Name,
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਜਾ ਰੰਕੁ ਦੋਊ ਮਿਲਿ ਰੋਈ ਹੈ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: raajaa rank doaoo mil roee hai |1|
lines.english: The king and the pauper both weep and cry. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਧਕਾਰ ਸੁਖਿ ਕਬਹਿ ਨ ਸੋਈ ਹੈ ॥
lines.translit: andhakaar sukh kabeh na soee hai |
lines.english: In the darkness, no one can sleep in peace.
It is like the shadow of a tree;
the person continues coming and going in reincarnation, crying out in pain. ||1||Pause||
It is like the music contained in the instrument;

lines.gurmukhi: ਮੂਏ ਮਰਮੁ ਕੋ ਕਾ ਕਰ ਜਾਨਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mooe maram ko kaa kar jaanaa |3|
lines.english: how can anyone know the secret of the dead? ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਨ ਗਏ ਕਹੁ ਕਾ ਕੀ ਮਾਇਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: praan ge kahu kaa kee maaeaa |2|
lines.english: when the breath of life passes out of the mortal being, tell me, what becomes of his wealth? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤਿ ਕੀ ਜਾਤਿ ਜਾਤਿ ਕੀ ਜੋਤੀ ॥
lines.translit: jot kee jaat jaat kee jotee |
lines.english: The creation is born of the Light, and the Light is in the creation.
Drink in the Lord's sweet elixir, Kabeer. ||4||8||
Like the swan on the lake, death hovers over the body.
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਵਨੁ ਸੁ ਘਰੁ ਜੋ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਕਹੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: kavan su ghar jo nirbhau kaheeai |
lines.english: Where is that home, which is said to be free of fear?

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਭਜਿ ਜਾਇ ਅਭੈ ਹੋਇ ਰਹੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: bhau bhaj jaae abhai hoe raheeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: There, fear is dispelled and one lives without fear. ||1||Pause||
It bears two fruits: the false glass and the true pearl. ||1||
People remain entangled in good and bad deeds. ||2||
On the banks of sacred rivers, the mind is not appeased.
Kabeer: O worthless mortal, do not lose the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਿਜ ਘਰਿ ਪਾਰਸੁ ਤਜਹੁ ਗੁਨ ਆਨ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: nij ghar paaras tajahu gun aan |3|
lines.english: In the home of your own being, is the Philosopher's Stone; renounce your search for any other virtue. ||3||
Keep this mind of yours involved in this involvement. ||4||9||
Sin and virtue are both the same.
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
He claims to know the Lord, who is beyond measure and beyond thought;
by mere words, he plans to enter heaven. ||1||
By mere talk, the mind is not appeased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾਨੁ ਜਾਨੁ ਸਭਿ ਕਹਹਿ ਤਹਾ ਹੀ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jaan jaan sabh kaheh tahaa hee |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Everyone claims that he plans to go there. ||1||Pause||
I do not know where heaven is.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਉ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨੈ ਜਾ ਤੇ ਹਉਮੈ ਜਈ ਹੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tau man maanai jaa te haumai jee hai |2|
lines.english: The mind is only appeased, when egotism is conquered. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਬ ਲਗੁ ਮਨਿ ਬੈਕੁੰਠ ਕੀ ਆਸ ॥
lines.translit: jab lag man baikuntth kee aas |
lines.english: As long as the mind is filled with the desire for heaven,

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਬ ਲਗੁ ਹੋਇ ਨਹੀ ਚਰਨ ਨਿਵਾਸੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: tab lag hoe nahee charan nivaas |3|
lines.english: he does not dwell at the Lord's Feet. ||3||
Says Kabeer, unto whom should I tell this?
The Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, is heaven. ||4||10||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
Before our very eyes, this world is passing away. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਜ ਨ ਮਰਹੁ ਕਹਹੁ ਘਰੁ ਮੇਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: laaj na marahu kahahu ghar meraa |
lines.english: How can you not die of shame, claiming, This world is mine?
We are born, and we grow, and having grown, we pass away.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਤ ਕੀ ਬਾਰ ਨਹੀ ਕਛੁ ਤੇਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ant kee baar nahee kachh teraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: At the very last moment, nothing is yours. ||1||Pause||
Trying various methods, you cherish your body,
but at the time of death, it is burned in the fire. ||2||
You apply sandalwood oil to your limbs,

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਤਨੁ ਜਲੈ ਕਾਠ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਾ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: so tan jalai kaatth kai sangaa |3|
lines.english: but that body is burned with the firewood. ||3||
Why do you cry and mourn, when another person dies?
your beauty shall vanish, as the whole world watches. ||4||11||
Says Kabeer, listen, O virtuous people:
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
Do so only if you yourself are to live. ||1||
I shall not die as the rest of the world dies,

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਬ ਮੋਹਿ ਮਿਲਿਓ ਹੈ ਜੀਆਵਨਹਾਰਾ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ab mohi milio hai jeeaavanahaaraa |1| rahaau |
lines.english: for now I have met the life-giving Lord. ||1||Pause||
People anoint their bodies with fragrant oils,
and in that pleasure, they forget the supreme bliss. ||2||
Even though the rope is broken, the fools continue trying to draw water. ||3||
There is one well, and five water-carriers.
Says Kabeer, through contemplation, I have obtained this one understanding.
There is no well, and no water-carrier. ||4||12||
Gauree, Kabeer Jee:
The mobile and immobile creatures, insects and moths
- in numerous lifetimes, I have passed through those many forms. ||1||
